anti_claims: This paper-module JSON row does not prove runtime correctness, release readiness, or whole-system completeness.
Legacy Markdown presence is not treated as source authority or as typed subject evidence.
Capsule-backed subject/code edges are structural references only; they do not prove implementation correctness.

compression.authority_ceiling: Public doctrine/routing/standard/receipt evidence and read-only evaluator receipts only; axiom witness-route source authority remains core/axiom_organ_routing.json, and claim_ceiling/strongest_allowed_claim remain computed by validator.microcosm.axiom_support_cover, not hand-stamped by this capsule or generated projections. No axiom proof certification, no candidate-law promotion, no source mutation authority, no provider/Lean/Lake execution, no release/publication approval, no private-root equivalence, and no whole-system correctness.
compression.card: Plectis Axiom Substrate is the public doctrine/routing boundary for axiom support. Its capsule binds the authored paper-module projection to the axiom support-cover mechanism and validator locus, with source refs to AXIOMS.md, PRINCIPLES.md, ANTI_PRINCIPLES.md, core/axiom_organ_routing.json, standards/std_microcosm_axiom.json, and focused tests. The validator computes support cases, anti-axiom rejection mappings, candidate pressure, and strong-gate pressure as a read-only projection.
compression.one_line: The public Plectis axiom substrate routes readers from axiom doctrine to the read-only support-cover evaluator, routing registry, standard, tests, and receipts without claiming proof, release, or source-mutation authority.
